techStack: Node.js + Express + TypeScript backend with React frontend

files.purpose: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts for backend and frontend
TypeScript configuration for compilation and type checking
Entry point for Express server, initializes routes, middleware, and database connection
Main Express app setup: routes, JSON parsing, CORS, authentication middleware
Implements Habit CRUD API endpoints with JWT authentication
Handles reminder schedule creation and management via Reminder Scheduler contract
Serves progress data for charts via Progress Chart Data API
Implements Streak Calculation Engine logic in response to HabitCompleted events
Orchestrates reminder delivery using Messaging Platform Adapters
Messaging Platform Adapter for SMS using Twilio or similar provider
Messaging Platform Adapter for Telegram via Bot API
Messaging Platform Adapter for WhatsApp via Twilio or official API
Event bus for emitting and handling internal events like HabitCompleted
JWT-based authentication middleware for protecting API routes
PostgreSQL data models using TypeORM or Prisma for core entities (Habit, User, etc.)
Database connection setup and initialization for PostgreSQL
Handles timezone-aware scheduling and streak calculations across user timezones
Implements retry logic for failed message deliveries per ADR-003
Main HTML page for React frontend application
Entry point for React app, renders root component and sets up providers
Root React component consuming Habit CRUD API and Progress Chart Data API
UI for creating and editing habits (FR-01, FR-08)
Displays user's habits with completion toggles and streaks (FR-10)
Visualizes habit completion over time using lightweight chart library (FR-03)
Allows customization of reminder schedules per habit (FR-02)
HTTP client for interacting with backend APIs with auth headers
Documentation: setup, run instructions, feature overview, and integration details

constraints: All services must communicate via REST APIs as per ADR-001
Streak updates must be event-driven using HabitCompleted events (ADR-002)
External messaging integrations must go through adapter layer (ADR-003)
PostgreSQL is the single source of truth for all core data (ADR-004)
JWT authentication required on all API endpoints
Reminder delivery must include retry logic and logging
Frontend must be React-based and consume defined API contracts
